candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue figure; matches REVT definition and equals Total operating income but is the standard label.
Duplicate of Revenue values; kept as secondary fallback label in case naming changes across years.
Finance income, not operating revenue; included in candidates but not appropriate for REVT so not selected in final_choice.
Balance sheet asset; not a revenue line so not used for REVT.
Balance sheet asset; not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Current accruals and current deferred income including current contract liabilities
candidates.why: Liability; represents contract liabilities/deferred income, not the revenue line itself.
Deferred income liability; not the revenue line.

variables.notes: Revenue is clearly the primary operating revenue line; Total operating income has identical values and is included as a fallback label per the priority rule.

candidates.why: Operating overhead, not clearly direct cost of sales; better suited as SG&A component than COGS.
Primarily personnel/overhead; while some may be in COGS, statement structure suggests it is broader operating expense.
Operating overhead, not direct production cost.
Balance sheet asset; not an expense line.
Liability; timing of various expenses, not COGS itself.

variables.notes: The true direct cost of sales is best represented by the Income Statement line 'Goods for resale', which is not in the provided COGS candidate list. Other candidates (Other Operating Expense, Employee benefits expense, Rental Expense) are more consistent with SG&A/overhead. Selected 'Goods for resale' from the full A-column as the closest match to COGS; reviewer should confirm that this line indeed represents cost of goods sold/services. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Goods for resale

candidates.why: Explicit operating expense bucket that is overhead rather than direct COGS; good SG&A component.

variables.notes: No single explicit SG&A line exists, so SG&A is constructed from major overhead components: Other External Costs, Other Operating Expense, Employee benefits expense, Rental Expense, and Auditor Fees - Total. Depreciation/amortization and impairments are excluded, as is the COGS-like line 'Goods for resale'. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Other External Costs, [Income Statement] Employee benefits expense, [Income Statement] Rental Expense, [Income Statement] Auditor Fees - Total

candidates.why: Represents capitalized R&D, not the primary period R&D expense; secondary relevance for XRD.
Explicit R&D expense line on the income statement; best match for XRD.
Amortization of previously capitalized R&D; more of a D&A item than current R&D spend.
Balance sheet asset reflecting accumulated capitalized R&D; not the period expense.
Gross capitalized R&D asset amount; not the period expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Accumulated amortization/impairment of capitalized R&D; not the period expense.

variables.notes: Mapped XRD to the explicit income statement line 'Research and Development', which represents the period’s R&D expense. Capitalized R&D and its amortization are not used as the primary XRD measure.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Explicit interest expense related to lease liabilities; core interest expense component.
Represents profit attributable to non-controlling interests, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest expense; good secondary label for XINT across years.
Balancing interest-cost item; may be needed as a fallback if main interest lines are missing.
Non-controlling interests in income, not interest expense.
Balance sheet total equity figure; unrelated to interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Interest expense is captured primarily by 'Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities'. The supplemental lease-interest line is a secondary source. 'Financial costs' is added as a broader fallback interest/finance cost line, and 'Interest cost - Balancing value' as a last-resort balancing adjustment. Minority interest and equity totals are correctly excluded. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Financial costs

candidates.why: Label used for shareholders’ equity; one instance carries the full equity amounts across all years.

candidates.row_label: Other equity including profit/loss for the year
candidates.why: Component of equity, not total equity; not suitable alone for BE denominator.
Total equity including any minority interest; duplicate of the full Equity line values here.
Balancing line, not the main equity total.
Balancing item with zero values; not the substantive equity amount.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing line ensuring Assets = Liabilities + Equity; not BE itself.
Balance sheet total; not equity alone.

variables.notes: Selected the main 'Equity' line that carries the full equity amounts (and matches 'Total Equity & Minority Interest'). No separate parent-vs-minority split appears to be reported, so this total equity is used for BE and MIB is set to 0.

candidates.why: Line exists but appears to have no reported amounts in the preview; company likely has no non-controlling interests in practice.
Same concept as Minority Interest; also appears empty.
Includes any minority interest within total equity, but there is no separate minority component disclosed.

variables.notes: There is no separate non-controlling interest line on the balance sheet, and the income statement minority interest rows appear unused. This suggests no material minority interest, so MIB is treated as 0 (final_choice is empty by design).
